title: Pet Pals: Marco Polo's Code
original_title: Cuccioli - Il codice di Marco Polo
overview: The Pet Pals are put to the test when the Evil Crow Witch is determined to drain the canals of Venice. Armed with a touch of magic, the Pet Pals combine their strengths to uncover the secret code before the Evil Witch does.
